lesson.menu_title: Who Is Maísa? -- Breaking the First Silence
lesson.menu_desc: Diagnostic + your first words in English at work -- 30 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Who Is Maísa? -- Diagnostic + Breaking the First Silence
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Maísa de Oliveira Santos | Aula 1 -- Diagnostic

listenings.text: Hi! My name is David. I am the new partner at the company. I am from Canada, but now I am here in Brazil. I work in finance, like you. I am very happy to be in Sao Paulo. It is a big and beautiful city. I am here for two weeks. I want to meet the team. It is nice to meet everyone. See you soon!

Good morning, everyone. My name is Sarah. I am the office manager. Welcome to the finance team. Our office is on the fifth floor. The meeting room is next to the elevator. The coffee is free in the kitchen. If you have a question, I am here to help. Have a great first day at work!

extra_audio.text: Hello! My name is Maisa. I am from Sao Paulo. I work in finance. It is nice to meet you.
